name: Franks and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 large Green peppers - cut into halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 450°.
2. In an oven-safe skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
3. Cook the peppers and onions until tender-crisp, about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the frankfurters and remaining ingredients except potatoes.
5. Arrange the frozen potato rounds evenly over the mixture in the skillet.
6. Bake for 30 minutes or until the potatoes are well browned. Carefully turn the potatoes after 15 minutes.
7. Gently toss before serving.
